academy.title: Enterprise AI & MLOps Bootcamp

dailyStudyPattern.note: Progress is based only on completed learning days

academy.targetOutcome: By Day 200, confidently clear Production AI and MLOps Engineer interviews with enterprise-ready project depth
interviewReadinessChecklist: Can design and explain end-to-end AI/ML platform architecture on Azure
Can implement and debug CI/CD for model and application pipelines
Can reason about model quality, drift, reliability, security, and cost
Can deliver production APIs with FastAPI, observability, and rollback strategy
Can explain RAG and Agentic AI trade-offs with real architecture decisions
Can present portfolio projects with measurable impact and clear ownership

confidenceMilestones.gate: Python + SQL problem solving and coding fluency
Data and ML fundamentals with metric interpretation
MLOps pipeline thinking with deployment confidence
GenAI and RAG system design communication
Agentic workflows and enterprise architecture defense
Full interview readiness across coding, system design, and platform operations
